columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_NUMBER

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Learner level access permission id to the learning item.

columns.Name: PRE_ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Predecessor assignment record id

columns.Name: SUCC_ASSIGNMENT_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Successor assignment record id

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason for assignment status change

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EVENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: EVENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID

columns.Name: EVENT_CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: EVENT_CREATED_BY_ID

columns.Name: VALIDITY_DATE
columns.Comments: The date from which the completed assignment is valid

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the assignment will expire.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ID

columns.Name: LEARNER_ID
columns.Comments: LEARNER_ID

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: ATTACHMENT_ID

columns.Name: DATE_STATUS_CHANGED
columns.Comments: DATE_STATUS_CHANGED

columns.Name: TOTAL_LEARNING_TIME
columns.Comments: TOTAL_LEARNING_TIME

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Current status of the share {ACTIVE, COMPLETED, EXPIRED, REVOKED, DELETED}.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_STATUS
columns.Comments: Current status of the share's notification {START, ..., END}.

columns.Name: CALCULATED_DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: The due date which is calculated based on the rules for the assignment.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date and time of the completion of the share.

columns.Name: IS_HISTORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: IS_HISTORY_FLAG

columns.Name: SOURCE_INFO
columns.Comments: Intended for customers to track where their imported records came from.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Intended for customers to track where their imported records came from.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Intended for customers to track where their imported records came from.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Associated content object. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Learning Item Category to differentiate same learning item type objects

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Polymorphic discriminator column. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: EVENT_SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: EVENT_SUB_TYPE. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_ID
columns.Comments: ATTRIBUTION_ID. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.Comments: ATTRIBUTION_LOOKUP_CODE. Denormalized from WLF_EVENTS

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the assignment is assigned and visible to the learner.

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_COMMENT
columns.Comments: Comments to be captured during status change. For example during Withdrawal or Completion.

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: To capture the change in status like Withdrawal or Completion either by Specialist, Self or Auto.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LI_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: indicates the date combined with learning item id  to be referenced with learning item table.

columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: REQUEST_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of request detail. Foreign key to WLF_REQUEST_DETAILS.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ACTUAL_EFFORT
columns.Comments: Actual effort learner has spent on an assignment.

columns.Name: SUB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Substatus of assignment record.

columns.Name: EFFORT_UOM
columns.Comments: EFFORT_UOM

columns.Name: PRICING_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule. Foreign key to WLF_PRICING_RULES_F.

columns.Name: PRICE_LOCK_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates date when price is locked.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_DETAILS_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule which is specific for assignment. Foreign key to WLF_PRICING_RULES_F.

columns.Name: PEND_PREREQ_CUTOFF_DATE
columns.Comments: Cutoff date when prereq has to evaluated

columns.Name: PH_DESTINATION_ID
columns.Comments: Placeholder destination id from WLF_PH_DESTINATION_F table

columns.Name: REQUESTED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment was requested

columns.Name: REQUEST_APPROVED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment request was approved

columns.Name: REQUEST_REJECTED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment request was rejected

columns.Name: WAITLISTED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which learner was placed on waitlist

columns.Name: DELETED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment record status was changed to deleted

columns.Name: WITHDRAWN_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment for a learner has been withdrawn

columns.Name: WAITLIST_POSITION
columns.Comments: This columns indicates the waitlisting position for a learner on an offering

columns.Name: ADMIN_ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Admin access permission identifier

columns.Name: PENDING_PREREQ_ENTERED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which assignment is entered into the pending prerequisite status

columns.Name: PENDING_PREREQ_EXITED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which assignment is exited out of the pending prerequisite status

columns.Name: WAITLIST_EXITED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which learner was confirmed with a seat

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STARTED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which learner started working on the learning assignment

columns.Name: CONTENT_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which learner moved into the content completion status

columns.Name: EVALUATION_SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which learner submitted the evaluation

columns.Name: PENDING_PAY_ENTERED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which assignment record entered to pending payment.

columns.Name: STATUS_EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which current assignment status expires.

columns.Name: IS_COURSE_SUBORDINATE
columns.Comments: Indicates master assignment

columns.Name: PAYMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for pricing rule Payment Type.Foreign key to WLF_PAYMENT_RULES_F.

columns.Name: BPM_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: BPM Task Identifier for the approval record

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_REQUESTED_DATE
columns.Comments: this column is used to store date of when withdraw requested

columns.Name: CPE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores continued professional education type. This column accepts values for lookup ORA_WLF_CPE_TYPE

columns.Name: CPE_POINTS
columns.Comments: This column stores continued professional education points for the given continued professional education type stored in CPE_TYPE column

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the category id of the assignment

columns.Name: CATEGORY
columns.Comments: This column stores the category of the assignment, this is applicable mainly for recommendations to categorize recommendations

columns.Name: ACTUAL_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column represents actual score rolled up from completion engine or user populates for external learning assignments

columns.Name: USE_COMPLETED_ATTEMPTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column will be used in the context of assignments auto completion. Assignments will not be auto completed when this flag is set with 'N' value.

columns.Name: LI_DEF_USED_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the timestamp of the learning item change used for this assignment record creation/update

columns.Name: LAST_RECONCILE_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the time when the reconcile is completed for assignment record.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Polymorphic discriminator column { DOCUMENT, VIDEO, TUTORIAL ... }.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: Learning Item sub type for the learning item type like ELearning. eg: Tutorial, Video etc.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Column to populate original denormalized event type when error assginment is created.

columns.Name: AC_EXPIRE_OLD_ON_COMPLETION
columns.Comments: Option to expire all completed assignments on current assignment completion

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Indicates if access is processed to security index or not

columns.Name: IS_FORCE_RETAKE
columns.Comments: Admin controlled force retake assignment flag

columns.Name: EXEMPTED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which assignment for a learner has been exempted

columns.Name: PENDING_SEAT_ACPT_ENTERED_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the date on which assignment is entered into the pending seat acceptance status

columns.Name: PENDING_SEAT_ACPT_EXITED_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the date on which assignment is exited out of the pending seat acceptance status

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ACTIVATED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the date when assignment entered to Active status

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_COMPLETED_BY
columns.Comments: This column stores how the assignment got completed

columns.Name: INCOMPLETE_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the date when assignment entered to Incomplete status

indexes.Columns: CAST("CALCULATED_DUE_DATE" AS TIMESTAMP), STATUS, EVENT_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
